scriptLines:
source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    output(
        ACCOUNT_NUMBER as string,
        CUSTOMER_NAME as string,
        ACCOUNT_STATUS as string,
        ACCOUNT_TYPE as string,
        EQUIPMET_DISCOUNT as string,
        PARTS_DISCOUNT as string,
        NATIONAL_DISCOUNT as string,
        CATEGORY_CODE as string,
        BILL_TO_ACCOUNT as string,
        PRICE_LIST as string,
        FREIGHT_TERMS as string,
        SHIPPING_METHOD as string,
        `Credit Hold` as string,
        `Payment Term` as string,
        `Large Customer` as string,
        `Site Number` as string,
        LAST_UPDATE_DATE as string,
        REL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER as string,
        CREATED_BY as string,
        CREATION_DATE as string,
        LAST_UPDATED_BY as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcStaged

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        opx_code as string,
        opx_equipmentdiscountid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_opx_equipmentdiscount

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        opx_code as string,
        opx_partdiscountid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_opx_partdiscount

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        opx_code as string,
        opx_nationaldiscountid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_opx_nationaldiscount

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        opx_code as string,
        opx_customercategoryid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_opx_customercategory

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        accountnumber as string,
        accountid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_account

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        name as string,
        pricelevelid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_pricelevel

source(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    broadcast: 'left',
    output(
        opx_code as string,
        opx_largecustomerid as string
    ),
    format: 'parquet'
) ~> srcMasters_opx_largecustomer

srcStaged derive(
    accountnumber = toString(ACCOUNT_NUMBER),
    name = toString(CUSTOMER_NAME),
    statecode = case(equals(ACCOUNT_STATUS, 'A'), 0, equals(ACCOUNT_STATUS, 'I'), 1, 0),
    opx_AccountType = case(equals(trim(ACCOUNT_TYPE), 'Billing Account'), 884870000, equals(trim(ACCOUNT_TYPE), 'Service Account'), 884870001, equals(trim(ACCOUNT_TYPE), 'Both'), 884870002, null())
) ~> dc_1

dc_2, srcMasters_opx_equipmentdiscount lookup(
    __lookup_key_opx_EquipmentDiscountId == srcMasters_opx_equipmentdiscount@opx_code,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_1

dc_4, srcMasters_opx_partdiscount lookup(
    __lookup_key_opx_partdiscountid == srcMasters_opx_partdiscount@opx_code,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_2

dc_6, srcMasters_opx_nationaldiscount lookup(
    __lookup_key_opx_nationaldiscountid == srcMasters_opx_nationaldiscount@opx_code,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_3

dc_8, srcMasters_opx_customercategory lookup(
    __lookup_key_opx_customercategoryid == srcMasters_opx_customercategory@opx_code,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_4

dc_10, srcMasters_account lookup(
    __lookup_key_msdyn_billingaccount == srcMasters_account@accountnumber,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_5

dc_12, srcMasters_pricelevel lookup(
    __lookup_key_defaultpricelevelid == srcMasters_pricelevel@name,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_6

dc_13 derive(
    address1_freighttermscode = case(null()),
    address1_shippingmethodcode = case(null()),
    creditonhold = case(or(equals(`Credit Hold`, 'Y'), equals(`Credit Hold`, 'Yes'), equals(`Credit Hold`, 'YES'), equals(`Credit Hold`, '1'), equals(`Credit Hold`, 'true')), true(), or(equals(`Credit Hold`, 'N'), equals(`Credit Hold`, 'No'), equals(`Credit Hold`, 'NO'), equals(`Credit Hold`, '0'), equals(`Credit Hold`, 'false')), false(), null()),
    paymenttermscode = case(null())
) ~> dc_14

dc_15, srcMasters_opx_largecustomer lookup(
    __lookup_key_opx_largecustomerid == srcMasters_opx_largecustomer@opx_code,
    multiple: false,
    pickup: 'any',
    broadcast: 'left'
) ~> lk_7

dc_16 derive(
    opex_SiteNumber = toString(`Site Number`),
    modifiedon = toTimestamp(LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    opx_fusionRefAccountNumber = toString(REL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER),
    opx_sourceCreatedBy = toString(CREATED_BY),
    overriddencreatedon = toTimestamp(CREATION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
    opx_sourceModifiedBy = toString(LAST_UPDATED_BY)
) ~> dc_17

dc_18 split(
    __row_valid == true(),
    disjoint: false
) ~> cs_1@(valid)

cs_1@valid sink(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError'
) ~> sinkFinal

cs_1 sink(
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError'
) ~> sinkTransformErrors
